member_session_id.description: Globally unique UUID that identifies a specific Session in the Stytch API. The `member_session_id` is critical to perform operations on an Session, so be sure to preserve this value.

session_token.description: A secret token for a given Stytch Session.

session_jwt.description: The JSON Web Token (JWT) for a given Stytch Session.

member_id.description: Globally unique UUID that identifies a specific Member. The `member_id` is critical to perform operations on a Member, so be sure to preserve this value.
